my_thoughts: 'I guess it did happen'—dropped negation. From 'didn't happen' to 'did happen' in two turns. Teacher's simple validation: 'Yes, it happened.' Confirms reality against defense. Two-turn breakthrough of negation.
accumulated_insight: T2 (Final): Student admits 'I guess it did happen.' From negation (T1) to acknowledgment (T2). Teacher validates: 'Yes, it happened.' Two-turn sequence breaks through negation defense.
visible_response: If those fists did what you would never do, how do you picture those fists going out on him, in your imagination?
